name: vidrush-render-worker
description: VidRush render worker — ffmpeg tier-1 renderer behind an HTTP endpoint, deployed to Fly.io. Keeps heavy renders off Vercel serverless.

scripts.sync:engine: cp ../app-live/lib/engine/render.ts src/render.ts && node -e "const f='src/render.ts',fs=require('fs');fs.writeFileSync(f,'// VENDORED from app-live/lib/engine/render.ts — regenerate with: npm run sync:engine. Do not edit here.\n'+fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'))"
